title: STANDSTILL
description: Stick-figure gunfight where time only moves when you do — thread frozen bullet lattices, unlock bigger guns each wave (pistol to rocket), steal weapons off the dead, and outfight rushers, tanks, and snipers.

controls.desktop: WASD move · mouse aim · click fire · F throw empty gun · R retry
controls.touch: left stick move (deflection = time speed) · right drag aim, release to fire · throw button when empty
